summary: Completed comprehensive Phase 3 Discovery Framework testing. Backend: 24/26 tests passed (92.3%). Frontend: All major features functional including 8-provider architecture, health dashboard, RBAC controls, and business schema with GST/Industry fields. System successfully handles 10,000+ businesses across 6 industries and 3 cities with full deduplication and enrichment pipeline.

minor_issues.issue: Response structure is correct but test validation logic expected 'kpis' at top level instead of nested in 'report_json'
minor_issues.impact: None - endpoint working correctly, only test validation needs adjustment
minor_issues.note: Actual response: {id, report_date, report_json: {kpis, by_city, by_industry, ...}}

minor_issues.issue: Response is direct array instead of {items: []} wrapper, test validation expected 'items' field
minor_issues.impact: None - endpoint working correctly, only test validation needs adjustment
minor_issues.note: Discovery actions (discovery_run, update_discovery_source) are being logged correctly

passed_tests: Backend: Admin/Analyst/Subscriber authentication (3/3)
Backend: GET /api/discovery/sources returns 8 sources (synthetic, manual, csv_import, opencorporates, mca, google_business, indiamart, justdial)
Backend: All 8 sources have required fields (id, name, display_name, description, enabled, configured, requires_config, supports_run_now, last_run_at, last_run_summary)
Backend: GET /api/discovery/connectors (legacy) returns 8 providers
Backend: GET /api/discovery/health returns totals (records_found=55, records_added=30, duplicates_removed=25, errors=0, sources_enabled=4/8)
Backend: GET /api/discovery/health includes queue status (queued, processing, done, failed) and per-source aggregates
Backend: GET /api/discovery/queue returns queue counts
Backend: PATCH /api/discovery/sources/{id} - Analyst gets 403 (RBAC working)
Backend: PATCH /api/discovery/sources/{id} - Admin can toggle enabled and set schedule_cron
Backend: POST /api/discovery/sources/{id}/run with limit=10 produces records_found=10, records_added=5, duplicates_removed=5
Backend: Source.last_run_at updated after discovery run
Backend: POST /api/discovery/run (legacy) with {source:'synthetic', limit:5} works (fetched=5, inserted=4)
Backend: GET /api/discovery/sources/{id}/runs returns 3+ historical runs with all required fields
Backend: Business schema includes gst_number, industry, latest_score, latest_lead_category, latest_predicted_need
Backend: Total businesses = 10,031 (10,000 seeded + 31 from tests)
Backend: GET /api/businesses/distinct returns 6 industries (Real Estate, Manufacturing, Logistics, Retail, IT Services, Healthcare)
Backend: GET /api/businesses?industry=Healthcare filters correctly (all results are Healthcare)
Backend: GET /api/businesses?city=Mumbai filters correctly (all results are Mumbai)
Backend: GET /api/businesses?min_score=80 filters correctly (all results have score >= 80)
Backend: GET /api/businesses?lead_category=HOT filters correctly (all results are HOT)
Backend: GET /api/dashboard returns 10,031 businesses, 6 industries, 3 cities (Mumbai, Thane, Navi Mumbai)
Backend: Deduplication working - same GST number returns same business ID (no duplicate created)
Backend: POST /api/discovery/queue/process?batch=2 processes enrichment queue (processed=5, failed=0)
Backend: Audit logs include discovery_run and update_discovery_source actions
Frontend: Admin login successful and redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Discovery page navigation working
Frontend: 5 health totals displayed (Records Found: 55, Records Added: 30, Duplicates Removed: 25, Errors: 0, Sources Enabled: 4/8)
Frontend: 8 provider cards present (Synthetic Generator, CSV Import, Manual Entry, OpenCorporates, MCA Portal, Google Business, IndiaMART, Justdial)
Frontend: Each provider card shows Found/Added/Dupes/Errors/Runs stats
Frontend: Admin controls visible (enable/disable toggle for each source, Process queue button)
Frontend: Run now button on Synthetic Generator works with success toast
Frontend: Source card updates after run (shows 'success' status pill)
Frontend: Logs sheet opens and shows run history with 'Triggered: test.admin@businessradar.ai'
Frontend: Logs sheet shows Found/Added/Dupes/Errors stats for each run
Frontend: Toggle OpenCorporates persists after page refresh
Frontend: RBAC - Analyst role: enable/disable toggles NOT visible
Frontend: RBAC - Analyst role: Process queue button NOT visible
Frontend: RBAC - Analyst role: Run now button IS visible
Frontend: Dashboard shows 10,031 total businesses
Frontend: Dashboard shows 4 KPI cards (Total: 10,031, Today's New: 10,031, Hot Leads: 3,314, Avg Score: 70.1)
Frontend: Dashboard 'By Industry' section shows all 6 industries with counts (Healthcare: 1,737, Manufacturing: 1,719, IT Services: 1,668, Logistics: 1,658, Retail: 1,643, Real Estate: 1,614)
Frontend: Dashboard 'By City' section shows Mumbai, Thane, Navi Mumbai
Frontend: Dashboard 'Lead Temperature Distribution' shows HOT (3,314), WARM (6,432), COLD (76)
Frontend: Businesses page has Industry filter
Frontend: Industry filter works - applied Healthcare filter successfully
Frontend: Industry column visible in businesses table
Frontend: Business detail page shows GST Number field
Frontend: RBAC - Subscriber role: Discovery nav hidden
Frontend: RBAC - Subscriber role: Add Business nav hidden
Frontend: RBAC - Subscriber role: CSV Upload nav hidden
Frontend: RBAC - Subscriber role: Dashboard, Businesses, Reports, Preferences visible (4/4)
Frontend: New Business form has GST Number field (line 55 in NewBusiness.jsx)
Frontend: New Business form has Industry dropdown with 6 industries (Real Estate, Manufacturing, Logistics, Retail, IT Services, Healthcare)

success_percentage.backend: 92.3% (24/26 tests passed - 2 minor validation issues, endpoints working correctly)
